case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. BROUSSARD, CHERAUN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, CHERAUN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-17-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: KENNEDY, JOHN I. ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS CHERAUN BROUSSARD AND DEFENDANT ROBERT MILTON WHOSE DEFAULT WAS ENTERED ON 6/28/96. PROVE UP AS TO THE NON-APPEARING DEFENDANT, CHERAUN BROUSSARD AND ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFAULTED DEFENDANT ROBERT MILTON. PRIMA FACIA CASE PRESENTED BY COUNSEL. PLTFS. WITNESSES S/E. PLTFS. EXHIBITS I.D. AND EVID. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING THE EXHIBITS ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION AGAINST BOTH CHERAUN BROUSSRD AND ROBERT MILTON AND MONEY JUDGMENT OF $1,949.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT CHERAUN BROUSSARD ONLY WITHOUT ATTOREY FEES OR COST.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MILTON, ROBERT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, CHERAUN MILTON, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1061 FITZGERALD AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124 $1,949.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,949.00, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JUDGMENT ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHERUN BROUSSARD. NO ATTORNEY FEES OR COST. MOREOVER THE DEFAULT OF ROBERT MILTON HAVING BEEN ENTERED ON 6/28/96 IT IS ALSO HEREBY ADJUDGED AN DECREED THAT RESTITUTION JUDGMENT BE AGAINST DEFAULTED DEFT. BERT MILTON WITHOUT ANY MONEY DUE AND OWING BY HIM.
